rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JANG 1991 TRUST (DATED 4/11/91) TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/10/20. Notice of an amendment requires the same notice as the pleading it amends (30 days for trusts). [CRC 7.53(a).] Original bank statements have not been filed to verify the ending balances. [LRSF 14.62.] The attorney's or fiduciary's declaration re retention of the originals must also be filed. [LRSF 2.11 M.4.] It is unclear how this is the proper venue; the trustee resides in Davis, CA.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JANG 1991 TRUST (DATED 4/11/91) TRUST

rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/10/20. The notice of hearing failed to include a description of the proerty or to state the information required by Prob. C. Section 851(c). The petition caption does not disclose that surcharge is being sought. [CRC 7.102.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DONALD MAJOR SMEDLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. The instant Report of Status was filed on 7/5/19. The hearings have been continued many times for various issues, and more than six months have now passed; however, the following issues are still outstanding: a. Administrator alleges in her declaration filed on 1/27/20 that "Letters of Administration have not been sent to all entities required under Probate Code §9202" but does not state why and when notice will be sent. b. Administrator acknowledges in her 1/27/20 declaration that waivers of bond were not correctly filled out; however, correctly filled out waivers of bond have not been filed. In addition, Administrator states that Monique Holloday has declined to waive bond and Freddie Smedley has not waived bond; however, no ex parte petition has been filed to increase bond. c. The Notice of Hearing filed on 1/27/20 is incomplete: i.Proof of Service does not indicate date of mailing (it is noted that signature is dated 1/27/20, which is less than 15 days from 2/4/20 hearing date). ii. Not all alleged heirs have been noticed (it is noted that the Proof of Service indicates that it is continued on an attachment, but no attachment was filed).
